title: JitoSOL Stake Position
description: Representation of a JitoSOL liquid staking position. JitoSOL is Solana's largest MEV-aware liquid staking token, backed by the Jito Stake Pool SPL program.

stakePoolAddress.description: On-chain address of the Jito Stake Pool program.

jitoSolMint.description: Mint address of the JitoSOL token.

currentExchangeRate.description: JitoSOL → SOL exchange rate at the snapshot time.

validatorSet.description: Validators that the stake pool delegates to, scored by StakeNet.
